name: cowart
description: Create, annotate, and generate on a local infinite canvas in Codex.
longDescription: Cowart brings a tldraw-powered infinite canvas into Codex for visual planning and creative iteration. Open a local canvas for the active project, sketch ideas, place AI image holders, generate images into selected slots, and turn annotated screenshots into revised image outputs while keeping canvas data in the user's project workspace.
author: ZHONG XIN

rules: manifest identity, version, interface and capability fields valid
README and declared skills/mcp paths present
